title: glaucium afghanicum
intro: Glaucium afghanicum, also known as Afghan Poppy or Horn Poppy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Papaveraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Afghanistan and Pakistan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, making it a potential remedy for various ailments. Glaucium afghanicum is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
